title: Maintain production growing environments
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain production growing environments demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Maintain environment systems

pcs.text: Follow biosecurity procedures, including access to sheds and boot washing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow biosecurity procedures, including access to sheds and boot washing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow biosecurity procedures, including access to sheds and boot washing.

pcs.text: Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out shed heating, cooling and ventilation systems maintenance.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check litter and manure conditions and report changes.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain lighting programs specified for the production unit and report variations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean light globes regularly and report malfunctions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check feeding times and feed rate when restricted feeding is practised and report malfunctions.

pcs.text: Carry out maintenance work according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out maintenance work according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out maintenance work according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check waterers in sheds and report malfunctions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check waterers in sheds and report malfunctions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check waterers in sheds and report malfunctions.

pcs.text: Check and report missing, faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report missing, faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor.
